activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_e.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: During chocolate production, conchi'ng' is carried out to refine texture.
They were homogenisi'ng' the milk mixture to ensure a consistent fat distribution.
The ma'ng'o slicer was sanitised before use to prevent cross-contamination.
The fi'ng'er food items were packaged in sealed containers for retail distribution.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_2_d.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Read the answer and use the pause to ask the correct question. Then compare your response with the model question.
 පිළිතුර කියවා නිවැරදි ප්‍රශ්නය ඇසීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න. ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
 பதிலைக் கவனமாக வாசித்து, இடைவெளியில் சரியான கேள்வியை கேளுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் கேள்வியை மாதிரி கேள்வியுடன் ஒப்பிடவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: Where should I leave the safety checklist?
example_dialogues.text_b: Leave it on the supervisor’s desk, next to the inspection file.

example_dialogues.text_a: Is there a calibrated measuring device anywhere in the workshop?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, there isn’t. In fact, there aren’t any calibrated measuring devices in the workshop at the moment.

example_dialogues.text_a: Do you complete maintenance reports on Monday mornings?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, I don’t. But I complete maintenance reports on Monday evenings. I have more time to focus on documentation in the evenings than in the mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Does she usually inspect the equipment on Friday afternoons?
dialogues.text_b: No, she rarely inspects the equipment on Friday afternoons. She usually inspects it on Tuesday mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Why are you testing the backup system manually?
dialogues.text_b: I am testing it manually because the automated system is offline. I always test it manually when the automated system is unavailable.

dialogues.text_a: Can he assist us with the final inspection tomorrow afternoon?
dialogues.text_b: I’m afraid he can’t. He has to attend a compliance meeting tomorrow afternoon, and no replacement has been assigned.

dialogues.text_a: What do you usually do during the weekend?
dialogues.text_b: I like to review new technical manuals. I normally analyse one manual every Saturday, but this weekend I am going to review three updated manuals.

dialogues.text_a: Sir, may I leave thirty minutes earlier today? I have severe back pain.
dialogues.text_c: I strained it while lifting a freezer.

dialogues.text_a: Can you operate the digital monitoring system independently?
dialogues.text_b: Yes, I can. I regularly operate the digital monitoring system in my current role. In fact, this is my primary responsibility on Wednesdays.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence: The blast chiller _____ fully operational today.
The quality inspector _____ contamination in the sample yesterday afternoon.
The thermometer is placed _____ the weighing scale and the mixing bowl on the counter.
She usually _____ the ingredients carefully, but she _____ them right now.
There _____ always a hygiene notice near the processing area.
There _____ six stainless steel trays inside the oven rack.
The supervisor _____ checks the storage temperature before production.
You _____ monitor the cooking time using the digital timer.
I _____ sanitise the work surface before starting preparation.
We _____ prepare the marinade for the chicken tomorrow morning.
_____ the technicians _____ all the production records yesterday?
The operator _____ the core temperature now to ensure safe cooking.
_____ any sealed containers in the cold storage room?
_____ she _____ the quality report every evening?
She _____ her hairnet and gloves before entering the processing area every day.

activity_b.text: The blast chiller is fully operational today.
The quality inspector found contamination in the sample yesterday afternoon.
The thermometer is placed between the weighing scale and the mixing bowl on the counter.
She usually measures the ingredients carefully, but she is packing them right now.
There is always a hygiene notice near the processing area.
There are six stainless steel trays inside the oven rack.
The supervisor usually checks the storage temperature before production.
You can monitor the cooking time using the digital timer.
I have to sanitise the work surface before starting preparation.
We are going to prepare the marinade for the chicken tomorrow morning.
Did the technicians complete all the production records yesterday?
The operator is checking the core temperature now to ensure safe cooking.
Are there any sealed containers in the cold storage room?
Does she write the quality report every evening?
She wears her hairnet and gloves before entering the processing area every day.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_d.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

Questions.question: What does Meena’s research about the company suggest?
Questions.answer: She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
options: She is mainly interested in wages and working hours.
She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
She expects full guidance without personal effort.

Questions.question: Why does Meena find food technology work satisfying?
Questions.answer: She enjoys varied processes and practical results.
options: She prefers repeating the same production tasks.
She enjoys varied processes and practical results.

Questions.question: What can be inferred about Meena’s approach to food safety?
Questions.answer: She treats food safety as part of everyday work.
options: She follows rules only during inspections.
She relies on others to control food risks.
She treats food safety as part of everyday work.

Questions.question: How does Meena respond to changes in food production methods?
Questions.answer: She accepts the need to keep learning at work.
options: She avoids new equipment and processes.
She accepts the need to keep learning at work.
She believes traditional methods are always enough.

Questions.question: What does Meena’s attitude toward feedback show?
Questions.answer: She uses feedback to improve and cooperate better.
options: She prefers working alone without guidance.
She uses feedback to improve and cooperate better.

activity_b.text: I enjoy working with food processes and seeing how raw ingredients are turned into safe, high-quality products.
Each production task is different, whether it involves preparation, processing, or packaging, which makes the work interesting.
I also enjoy working as part of a team in a production environment.
I am confident with basic food preparation, weighing and measuring ingredients, mixing processes, and cleaning equipment.
I have also assisted with packaging, labelling, and basic quality checks during production.
I always follow food safety and hygiene procedures.
I wear protective clothing, wash and sanitise my hands and equipment, and prevent cross-contamination during processing.
I also make sure work areas are kept clean to reduce food safety risks.
I can operate basic food processing machines and follow standard operating procedures.
I understand the importance of temperature control and proper storage.
As food technology continues to develop, I try to learn by following instructions and observing experienced staff.
I communicate well with supervisors and co-workers and am comfortable following instructions.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.

Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Watch the video.
වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.
